creator: scottm@cs.ucla.edu
text:
make PREFIX=/your/fav/path/here for kdeutils11 is broken -- configure
doesn't find libraries which may be located in ${LOCALBASE}.

Fix: Apply the following patch to /usr/ports/misc/kdeutils11/Makefile:
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/misc/kdeutils11
make PREFIX=/your/fav/path/here
